# Comma Operator

Comma operator for sequential evaluation

```perl
$result = ($operation1, $operation2, $final_value);
```

# Expected Compilation Outcomes

## Comma Operator

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$result = ($operation1, $operation2, $final_value);
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$result = ($operation1, $operation2, $final_value);
```

### Inferred Perl Output

```perl
# Type inference not yet fully implemented
```
